creator: Chris Huber Reitz
name: APA
quote: AI is not a conscious human who can consent to the duties and responsibilities of authorship, which include responsibility for post publication changes such as corrections or retractions.

reviewRating.ratingExplanation: Composite Calibrated Authority score (sum of six 0-2 dimensions). Breakdown — D1 Traceability & inspectability: 2; D2 Human authorship & accountability: 2; D3 Disclosure & labeling: 2; D4 Synthetic-identity / fabrication prohibition: 2; D5 Human validation in loop: 2; D6 Evidential-trust emphasis: 1.
